6 key takeaways from: This Week in Threats: Jun 23–Jul 07, 2026

1. CVE-2026-48558 — SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
2. CVE-2026-34908 — Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
3. CVE-2026-34909 — Ubiquiti UniFi OS Path Traversal Vulnerability
4. CVE-2026-12569 — PTC Windchill and FlexPLM Improper Input Validation Vulnerabili
5. CVE-2025-67038 — Lantronix EDS5000 Code Injection Vulnerability
6. CVE-2026-45659 — Microsoft SharePoint Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data V

Which one surprised you the most? Comment below!
